creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: kmacy->freebsd-fs

kmacy has asked for all of his PRs to be reassigned back to the pool. 

To submitter: It is believed that this was fixed some years back, and feedback 
on this was requested.  If you did provide feedback then it doesn't appear to 
have made it into the PR trail - could you please resend it?
